answer:
The sequential portion is 40 seconds, and the parallelizable portion is 60 seconds. With 2 processors, the parallel part takes 60/2 = 30 seconds, so total time is 40 + 30 = 70 seconds. With 4 processors, the parallel part takes 60/4 = 15 seconds, so total time is 40 + 15 = 55 seconds.  

\boxed{F}
